title: Build Library
description: This mod adds an in-game build library for my community, where players can browse featured builds, view previews and materials, and instantly download schematics directly in Minecraft.
body:
## Build Library

Build Library is an in-game featured build browser made for my community. It allows players to discover featured builds, preview them directly inside Minecraft, check the required materials, and instantly download the schematic without needing to leave the game or search through external links.

The goal of the mod is to make community builds easier to access and use. Instead of opening websites, downloading files manually, and moving schematics into the right folder yourself, everything can be done from one in-game screen. Players can simply browse the library, open a build they like, view more details, and save the schematic directly to their local schematic folder.

## Features

- Browse featured community builds in a clean in-game library
- Open a detailed view with preview images, build info, and descriptions
- View a materials list before starting the build
- Download schematics instantly to your local schematic folder
- Favorite, like, and dislike builds for easier personal browsing
- Explore gallery images for each featured build

## How To Open

By default, Build Library opens with the `Right Alt` key.

## Community

This mod is made for my YouTube and community builds, so players can quickly access featured schematics in-game and start building right away.

YouTube: `https://www.youtube.com/@oDilanYT`
